mapper.sql: SELECT gi.id, gi.game_id, g.name AS game_name, gi.serial_number, gi.status FROM game_item gi INNER JOIN game g ON gi.game_id = g.id
mapper.select: WHERE gi.status = #{status} ORDER BY gi.game_id, gi.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_item (game_id, serial_number, status) VALUES (#{gameId}, #{serialNumber}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game_history gh JOIN game_item gi ON gh.game_item_id = gi.id JOIN game g ON gi.game_id = g.id WHERE gh.session_id = #{sessionId} AND gh.status = 'RENTED' AND gh.rented_at >= (SELECT o.ordered_at FROM orders o WHERE o.id = #{orderId}) AND g.name IN ( SELECT oi.menu_name FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} AND oi.price = 0 )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_history (session_id, game_item_id, rented_at, status) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{gameItemId}, NOW(), 'RENTED')
mapper.select: SELECT gh.id AS historyId, gh.game_item_id AS gameItemId, g.name AS gameName, gi.serial_number AS serialNumber, gh.status AS rentalStatus, gh.rented_at AS rentedAt FROM game_history gh JOIN game_item gi ON gh.game_item_id = gi.id JOIN game g ON gi.game_id = g.id WHERE gh.session_id = #{sessionId} AND gh.status = 'RENTED' ORDER BY gh.rented_at DESC

SELECT gh.id AS historyId, gh.game_item_id AS gameItemId, g.name AS gameName, gi.serial_number AS serialNumber, gh.status AS rentalStatus, gh.rented_at AS rentedAt, gh.returned_at AS returnedAt FROM game_history gh JOIN game_item gi ON gh.game_item_id = gi.id JOIN game g ON gi.game_id = g.id WHERE gh.session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY gh.rented_at DESC, gh.id DESC
SELECT id AS historyId, session_id AS sessionId, game_item_id AS gameItemId, status FROM game_history WHERE id = #{historyId}
mapper.update: UPDATE game_history SET status = #{status}, returned_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{historyId}
UPDATE game_history SET status = 'NORMAL', returned_at = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND status = 'RENTED'
UPDATE game_item gi JOIN game_history gh ON gh.game_item_id = gi.id SET gi.status = 'NORMAL' WHERE gh.session_id = #{sessionId} AND gh.status = 'NORMAL' AND gi.status = 'RENTED'
